title: NEXUS Wire Protocol — Message Payload Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for every NEXUS message type that carries a JSON payload. Each msg_type maps to a schema that the payload must conform to after COBS decoding. Message types with binary payloads (0x0E OBS_DUMP_CHUNK, 0x12 FIRMWARE_UPDATE_CHUNK) are defined in wire_protocol_spec.md Section 7.

mac_address.description: MAC-48 address in colon-separated hex notation.

error_code.description: Error code in hex notation, e.g. '0x0001'.

role_name.description: Node role identifier (alphanumeric + underscore, must start with a letter).

mac_address.description: Unique MAC address of the node's network interface.

cpu_frequency_mhz.description: Current CPU clock frequency in MHz.

flash_size_kb.description: Total flash memory size in kilobytes.

firmware_version.description: Semantic version of the running firmware.

firmware_build_date.description: ISO 8601 build timestamp of the firmware (UTC).

firmware_hash.description: SHA-256 of the firmware binary currently running.

boot_timestamp_ms.description: Node's uptime in milliseconds at the time this message was composed.

boot_count.description: Total number of power-on/boot cycles since factory reset.

max_i2c_buses.description: Number of independent I2C bus peripherals.

max_spi_buses.description: Number of independent SPI bus peripherals.

max_pwm_channels.description: Number of hardware PWM output channels.

has_wifi.description: Whether the node has a Wi-Fi radio.

has_bluetooth.description: Whether the node has a Bluetooth/BLE radio.

has_can.description: Whether the node has a CAN bus controller.

has_ethernet.description: Whether the node has an Ethernet MAC.

has_usb.description: Whether the node has a USB device/host controller.

max_reflexes.description: Maximum number of reflexes that can be loaded simultaneously.

max_obs_buffer_kb.description: Maximum observation recording buffer in kilobytes.

supported_msg_types.description: List of message type IDs (hex strings) that this firmware understands.

role.description: The role name assigned to this node.

role_version.description: Configuration schema version number. Incremented when role definition changes.

label.description: Human-readable label for this pin assignment.

initial_value.description: Initial output state for OUTPUT/PWM modes (0=LOW, 1=HIGH). Ignored for input modes.

inverted.description: If true, logical values are inverted (active-low).

pwm_frequency_hz.description: PWM frequency in Hz. Required when mode is PWM.

pwm_resolution_bits.description: PWM duty cycle resolution in bits. Required when mode is PWM.

adc_resolution_bits.description: ADC resolution in bits. Required when mode is ADC.

adc_attenuation_db.description: ADC input attenuation in dB. Higher values allow larger input voltages.

debounce_ms.description: Software debounce interval in milliseconds. 0 disables debounce.

interrupt_mode.description: GPIO interrupt trigger mode. NONE disables interrupts.

i2c_bus_index.description: I2C bus peripheral index. Required for I2C_SDA/I2C_SCL pins.

i2c_speed_hz.description: I2C bus clock speed in Hz.

spi_bus_index.description: SPI bus peripheral index. Required for SPI pins.

spi_mode.description: SPI clock polarity and phase mode (0-3).

safe_value.description: Value to drive when entering failsafe mode. Applies to OUTPUT and PWM modes.

pins.description: Array of pin configurations for this role.

telemetry_interval_ms.description: Periodic telemetry send interval in milliseconds.

pin.description: Pin number to include in telemetry.

sample_count.description: Number of samples to average per telemetry reading.

report_changed_only.description: If true, only include this channel when its value changes by more than the delta threshold.

delta_threshold.description: Minimum change required to report when report_changed_only is true.

telemetry_channels.description: Explicit list of channels to include in telemetry. If omitted, all configured input pins are reported.

name.description: Reflex name. Must match a reflex deployed via REFLEX_DEPLOY.

auto_start.description: Whether to automatically activate this reflex on role assignment.

reflexes.description: List of reflexes to attach to this role. The reflex definitions must have been deployed separately via REFLEX_DEPLOY.

overcurrent_limit_ma.description: Overcurrent trip threshold in milliamps. 0 disables monitoring.

thermal_limit_celsius.description: Die temperature limit in degrees Celsius.

role.description: The role name that was assigned (echoed back).

role_version.description: The role version that was accepted or rejected.

accepted.description: True if the node accepted the role, false if rejected.

rejection_reason.description: Human-readable reason for rejection. Required when accepted is false.

rejection_error_code.description: Error code associated with the rejection. Required when accepted is false.

pins_applied.description: Number of pin configurations that were successfully applied.

pins_failed.description: List of pins that failed to configure. Empty if all pins succeeded.

passed.description: True if all tests passed, false if any test failed.

duration_ms.description: Total time to execute all self-tests in milliseconds.

detail.description: Additional information about the test result.

value.description: Numeric measurement or count from the test. Type varies by test.

error_code.description: Error code if the test failed.

gpio_pin_results.description: Per-GPIO pin test results. Pin is tested for stuck/floating/short conditions where applicable.

device_id.description: Identified device name or manufacturer (if known).

i2c_scan_results.description: Results of scanning each I2C bus for connected devices.

raw_value.description: ADC raw reading with no load (floating or tied to reference).

voltage_mv.description: Converted voltage in millivolts (if reference is known).

adc_probe_results.description: ADC channel probe results with no-load readings.

timestamp_ms.description: Local timestamp when this telemetry snapshot was taken.

sequence_id.description: Rolling telemetry sequence counter (wraps at uint32 max).

pin.description: Pin number this reading is from.

label.description: Pin label as configured in ROLE_ASSIGN.

value.description: The sensor reading value. Type depends on pin mode: boolean for digital inputs, integer for ADC (raw), number for computed voltage/current.

raw_adc.description: Raw ADC reading. Present when pin mode is ADC.

current_ma.description: Computed current in milliamps (if shunt/sensor configured).

is_digital.description: True if this is a digital (HIGH/LOW) reading.

digital_state.description: Digital pin state. True = HIGH, False = LOW. Present when is_digital is true.

samples_averaged.description: Number of raw samples averaged to produce this value.

channels.description: Array of channel readings in this telemetry snapshot.

heap_min_free_kb.description: All-time minimum free heap (watermark) in kilobytes.

stack_free_bytes.description: Free stack space on the main task in bytes.

die_temp_c.description: Internal die temperature in degrees Celsius.

reset_reason.description: Reason for the most recent reset.

system.description: System health metrics. Included when system monitoring is enabled.

pin.description: Target pin number. Required for SET_PIN, SET_PWM, READ_PIN.

value.description: Command value. For SET_PIN: boolean (true=HIGH, false=LOW). For SET_PWM: number (0.0-1.0 duty cycle) or integer (raw duty).

reflex_name.description: Target reflex name. Required for START_REFLEX, STOP_REFLEX, TRIGGER_REFLEX.

action_name.description: Named action to execute. Required for EXECUTE_ACTION. Actions are defined in the role configuration.

additionalProperties.description: Action parameter value. Can be string, number, boolean, or array.

action_params.description: Parameters for EXECUTE_ACTION. Key-value pairs matching the action's parameter schema.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum time to wait for command completion. 0 = no wait (fire and forget).

label.description: Optional human-readable label for this command (for logging and debugging).

original_sequence.description: Sequence number of the message being acknowledged.

original_msg_type.description: Message type ID (hex) of the message being acknowledged.

status.description: Result status of the acknowledged operation.

error_code.description: Error code if status is not SUCCESS. Present on failure.

error_detail.description: Human-readable error description. Present on failure.

result.description: Result data. Structure depends on the original message type and command. Can be any JSON value.

processing_time_ms.description: Time elapsed between receiving the original message and sending this ack, in milliseconds.

retry_after_ms.description: If status is BUSY, suggested retry delay in milliseconds.

name.description: Unique reflex name. If a reflex with this name already exists, it is replaced.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this reflex does.

priority.description: Execution priority relative to other reflexes.

enabled.description: Whether this reflex is initially enabled when deployed.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum time to execute all actions. 0 = no timeout.

max_fire_rate_hz.description: Maximum number of times per second this reflex may fire. 0 = unlimited.

cooldown_ms.description: Minimum time between successive firings of this reflex in milliseconds.

pin.description: Pin number. Required for PIN_EDGE, PIN_LEVEL, PIN_LEVEL_WINDOW.

edge.description: Edge trigger direction. Required for PIN_EDGE.

level.description: Expected level. Required for PIN_LEVEL. True = HIGH.

window_start.description: Window start threshold. Required for PIN_LEVEL_WINDOW and ADC_WINDOW.

window_end.description: Window end threshold. Required for PIN_LEVEL_WINDOW and ADC_WINDOW.

channel.description: ADC channel. Required for ADC_THRESHOLD and ADC_WINDOW.

period_ms.description: Timer period in milliseconds. Required for TIMER.

sub_triggers.description: Sub-triggers for COMBO_AND / COMBO_OR. All (AND) or any (OR) must be satisfied.

hysteresis.description: Hysteresis value to prevent rapid re-triggering on noisy signals.

debounce_ms.description: Additional debounce for this trigger beyond the pin's global debounce.

triggers.description: Trigger conditions. The reflex fires when any trigger is satisfied.

pin.description: Target pin. Required for SET_PIN, SET_PWM, PULSE_PIN, TOGGLE_PIN.

value.description: Value for SET_PIN (boolean) or SET_PWM (number 0.0-1.0 or integer raw).

reflex_name.description: Target reflex name. Required for START_REFLEX, STOP_REFLEX.

delay_ms.description: Delay before executing next action. Required for DELAY.

sequence.description: Nested action sequence for SEQUENCE type.

repeat.description: Number of times to repeat this action.

actions.description: Actions to execute when the reflex fires. Executed sequentially.

version.description: Version of the currently loaded reflex definition.

fire_count.description: Total number of times this reflex has fired since load.

last_fire_ms.description: Timestamp of the last fire (0 if never fired).

last_execution_time_us.description: Execution time of the most recent firing in microseconds.

last_error.description: Error message from the last failed execution.

cooldown_remaining_ms.description: Remaining cooldown time before this reflex can fire again.

reflexes.description: Array of all loaded reflexes and their current status.

recording_id.description: Unique identifier for this recording session.

sample_rate_hz.description: Per-channel sample rate. The hardware must support this rate.

max_duration_ms.description: Maximum recording duration in milliseconds. 0 = unlimited (until stopped or buffer full).

max_buffer_kb.description: Maximum recording buffer size in kilobytes. Ring-buffer behavior when full.

trigger_pin.description: Optional pin to use as a recording trigger. Recording starts on the configured edge.

trigger_edge.description: Trigger edge. Required when trigger_pin is set.

pretrigger_samples.description: Number of samples to retain before the trigger event (pre-trigger buffer).

recording_id.description: Identifier of the recording to stop.

finalize.description: If true, prepare the recording for immediate dump. If false, keep in buffer for later retrieval.

recording_id.description: Identifier of the recording being dumped.

total_frames.description: Total number of observation frames in this recording.

total_chunks.description: Total number of OBS_DUMP_CHUNK messages that will follow.

chunk_size_bytes.description: Size of each chunk in bytes.

total_data_bytes.description: Total uncompressed data size in bytes.

scale_factor.description: Multiplier to convert raw ADC to engineering units.

channels.description: Channel metadata for the recorded data.

start_timestamp_ms.description: Node's local timestamp when recording started.

end_timestamp_ms.description: Node's local timestamp when recording stopped.

frames_dropped.description: Number of frames that were dropped due to buffer overflow.

data_crc32.description: CRC-32 (hex, lowercase) of all raw data across all chunks concatenated.

recording_id.description: Identifier of the recording that was dumped.

chunks_sent.description: Total number of OBS_DUMP_CHUNK messages actually sent.

total_bytes_sent.description: Total uncompressed data bytes sent across all chunks.

data_crc32.description: CRC-32 (hex) of all raw data bytes sent. Must match OBS_DUMP_HEADER.data_crc32.

error_code.description: Error code if status is ERROR.

error_detail.description: Error description if status is ERROR or PARTIAL.

value.description: New value for the property. Type depends on property: string for mode/pull/interrupt_mode/label, integer for numeric properties, boolean for inverted.

changes.description: Array of pin configuration changes to apply.

firmware_size.description: Total firmware image size in bytes.

total_chunks.description: Total number of FIRMWARE_UPDATE_CHUNK messages to follow.

chunk_size.description: Size of each firmware chunk in bytes.

firmware_version.description: Version string of the new firmware.

expected_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the complete firmware image. Used for post-transfer verification.

partition.description: Target flash partition for the update.

force_update.description: If true, allow downgrade and skip version comparison.

reboot_after.description: If true, automatically reboot into the new firmware after successful verification.

rollback_on_failure.description: If true, automatically roll back to the previous firmware if the new one fails post-boot verification.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata stored alongside the firmware image.

action.description: Action to take. VERIFY: compute hash and validate. ABORT: discard the update. COMMIT: mark the new partition as bootable.

status.description: Final outcome of the firmware update.

actual_hash.description: Computed SHA-256 of the received firmware. Present on HASH_MISMATCH for debugging.

new_version.description: Version of the newly installed firmware. Present on SUCCESS.

previous_version.description: Version that was running before the update.

reboot_required.description: True if a reboot is needed to activate the new firmware.

reboot_timestamp_ms.description: Planned reboot time. Present when reboot_required is true.

error_code.description: Error code from the NEXUS Error Code Registry.

source.description: Subsystem or module that generated the error (e.g., 'adc', 'i2c_bus_0', 'reflex_engine').

additionalProperties.description: Context value. Can be string, number, or boolean.

context.description: Additional context key-value pairs for debugging (e.g., pin number, register value, retry count).

related_sequence.description: Sequence number of the message that caused this error, if applicable.

related_msg_type.description: Message type that caused this error, if applicable.

timestamp_ms.description: Local timestamp when the error occurred.

count.description: Number of times this exact error has occurred since the last report.

action_taken.description: Automated action taken in response to this error.

target_baud.description: Requested baud rate to switch to.

switch_delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds between the ack and the actual baud switch. Both sides must switch after this delay.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this cloud context request.

recording_id.description: Recording to use as input for cloud analysis.

start.description: Start of time window (offset from recording start).

end.description: End of time window (offset from recording start).

time_window_ms.description: Optional time window within the recording to analyze.

analysis_type.description: Type of cloud analysis to perform.

parameters.description: Analysis-specific parameters passed through to the cloud pipeline.

response_channel.description: How results should be delivered back to the node.

request_id.description: Echoes the request_id from the original CLOUD_CONTEXT_REQUEST.

analysis_type.description: Type of analysis that was performed.

results.description: Analysis results. Structure depends on analysis_type.

confidence.description: Confidence score of the analysis result (0.0 to 1.0).

target.description: Target entity (reflex name, pin label, sensor ID, etc.).

auto_apply.description: Whether the node should automatically apply this recommendation.

recommended_actions.description: List of actions recommended by the cloud analysis.

model_version.description: Version of the ML model used for analysis.

processing_time_ms.description: Total cloud processing time in milliseconds.

error_message.description: Error description if status is ERROR.

i2c_devices.description: Results of scanning all I2C buses.

raw_value.description: ADC raw reading with no load.

connected.description: True if a sensor appears to be connected (value not at rail).

noise_rms.description: RMS noise measured in ADC counts (from 10-sample burst).

spi_devices.description: SPI device probe results (if SPI is configured).

scan_duration_ms.description: Total time to complete the auto-detect scan.

timestamp_ms.description: Local timestamp when the safety event occurred.

error_code.description: Corresponding error code from the Error Code Registry.

description.description: Detailed description of the safety event.

pin.description: Pin number involved in the safety event (if applicable).

channel.description: ADC channel involved (for overcurrent or voltage events).

measured_value.description: The measured value that triggered the safety event (e.g., current in mA, temperature in °C, voltage in mV).

actions_taken.description: List of automated actions taken in response to the safety event.

state.description: State the pin was driven to.

pin_states.description: State of all output pins after the safety event (for audit).

recovery_required.description: Whether manual intervention is required to clear this safety event.

auto_recovery_ms.description: If recovery_required is false, time in ms until automatic recovery attempt.
